seoDescription: In-depth case studies showcasing our AI and software solutions.
keywords: case studies, AI solutions, custom CRM, workflow automation
headline: Case Studies
supportingText: Explore in-depth case studies of our work. Each case study covers the client's challenge, our approach, and the outcome.

cases.title: Financial Startup Chatbot
cases.challenge: Time-consuming customer support handling repetitive FAQ requests, leading to slow response times.
cases.solution: Developed a custom AI-powered chatbot with natural language understanding, integrated into the website and messaging apps.
cases.outcome: 50% reduction in support tickets, response times reduced by 60%, and significantly improved user satisfaction.

cases.title: Manufacturing CRM Platform
cases.challenge: Disconnected sales tools, scattered client data, and slow processes that delayed order tracking.
cases.solution: Built a custom multi-tenant CRM with workflow automation, integrated directly with their legacy ERP system.
cases.outcome: 30% faster sales cycle, real-time order tracking across teams, and zero manual data entry errors.
